memberdef.name: XPlmi_Secure
memberdef.initializer: = { XPLMI_MODULE_XILSECURE_ID, XSecure_Cmds, XSECURE_API(XSECURE_API_MAX), NULL, XSecure_AccessPermBuff, NULL, }

briefdescription.para: This function checks if a particular Secure API ID is supported or not.

parameterdescription.para: API ID in the IPI request.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If API ID is unsupported.

briefdescription.para: This function processes XilSecure IPI commands.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function registers the XilSecure commands to the PLMI.
This file contains the Xilsecure IPI handler implementation.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.7 tvp 02/19/26 Initial release tvp 03/18/26 Add support for MLDSA signature generation and verification command tvp 03/20/26 Add support for SLHDSA signature verification command mb 04/17/26 Update XSecure_CryptoCheck API definitions
